title: The Class Trip to the Museum
synopsis: A school trip becomes exciting when a child discovers that museums can feel like time travel.
sentences: Ms. Green's class went to the city museum on a cool Thursday morning.
The children lined up in pairs and followed their teacher through the front doors.
Inside, the museum felt quiet and very large.
Leo expected the visit to be boring, but he changed his mind quickly.
In the first room, he saw a giant dinosaur skeleton stretching almost to the ceiling.
In another room, he found old coins, pots, and tools from long ago.
A guide explained how people used those objects in everyday life.
Leo wrote notes in a small booklet while his friends asked many questions.
At lunchtime, the class sat together outside and talked about their favorite exhibits.
Leo said the museum felt like a place full of hidden stories.
On the bus ride home, he kept looking at the booklet in his hands.
He decided he wanted to visit the museum again with his family.
